description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that defines a hidden job named .common-ci-tokens which aggregates a set of token includes for all branches. Use the extends keyword to inherit from .tokens-for-all-branches, .helm-build-trigger-token, .slack-token, .slack-release-tools-bot-user-token, .slack-release-tools-admin-user-token, .slack-release-tools-non-admin-user-token, .sentry-auth-token, .release_bot_dev_token, .release-bot-ops-token, .release-bot-production-token, .gitlab-observability-namespace-token, .release-bot-com-read-token, .release-bot-version-token, .gitlab-org-gitlab-project-access-token, and .release-bot-private-key. No image, script, stages, or artifacts are needed because this job only provides token variables to other jobs.
